column1: # NCBI genome assembly accessions for the 12 species in the comparative set.
# Used by scripts/download_genomes.sh to fetch the raw assemblies that BRAKER3
#   role = focal_set2 (A. laticeps focal) / focal_set3 (D. maculatus focal) / comparison
# NOTE: three accessions below are marked NEEDS_TABLE_S1 — their source assemblies
# are not recorded anywhere in the analysis workspace and must be filled in from the
# manuscript's Table S1 before release. Diptychus_maculatus uses GCA_041504395.2,
# the version stated in the manuscript's Data Accessibility section (a local build
# record showed the earlier .1 version of the same assembly).
